label: Draft
description: Internal prototype state. Suitable for design iteration only.

label: Classroom prototype
description: Can be shown in supervised teaching or hackathon contexts with uncertainty labels visible.

label: Internal reviewed
description: Project team has linked source anchors and identified major public-use blockers.

label: Egyptologist reviewed
description: Specialist review completed for proportion, pose, iconography, clothing, context, and interpretive text.

label: Public exhibition ready
description: Approved for public display with citations, rights, uncertainty labels, and reviewed narration in place.
